query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.phone, u.id as userId 
FROM partners p 
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.phone = u.username 
WHERE p.phone IN ('13900000200', '13900000602', '13900000989') 
   OR p.name LIKE '%测试合伙人%' 
   OR p.name LIKE '%多城市合伙人%' 
   OR p.name LIKE '%无城市合伙人%';
